An hallucination may be auditory (hearing voices), visual (seeing people, animals), tactile (feeling bugs crawling over sking), olfactory (smelling poisonous fumes), or gustatory (having strange tastes). 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
103 J1J J1J_INTERN_BLEED 27e(J1j)Internal Bleeding CHAR 1 Indicates the patient has internal bleeding - bleeding may be frank (such as bright red blood) or occult. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1
